meta.title: AI Solutions for Smarter Public Finance | iKwook
meta.description: We partner with government agencies to recover lost revenues and bring discipline to public spending through intelligent, auditable, custom-built AI models.

hero.title: The AI Command Center for Smarter Public Finance
hero.subtitle: We partner with government agencies at all levels to recover lost revenues and bring discipline to public spending through intelligent, auditable, and custom-built models.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by public institutions across Canada

platform.title: One Platform. Two Service Areas.
platform.subtitle: Launch sovereign intelligence in weeks, then scale across revenue recovery and expenditure rationalization with a unified data foundation.

lifecycle.title: Protect Public Finance at Every Step
lifecycle.subtitle: From audit prioritization to spending quality, our models give agencies the tools to protect revenue and discipline expenditure across the full lifecycle.

audit.title: Data Foundation & Audit Prioritization
audit.description: Aggregate agency data sources and surface high-risk cases before enforcement teams act using explainable models built for your legal framework.

detect.title: Fraud & Anomaly Detection
detect.description: Detect sales underreporting, income inconsistencies, customs fraud, and expenditure anomalies with AI scoring your teams can defend in audit.

enforce.title: Build, Deploy & Transfer
enforce.description: Deploy custom models inside your environment, refine performance with your data, and transfer full ownership to your agency teams.

optimize.title: Spending Quality & Accountability
optimize.description: Benchmark program spending against outcomes, identify waste before it compounds, and support data-driven budget decisions.

why.title: Built for What Generic Vendors Can't Deliver
why.subtitle: Public finance leaders need explainable, sovereign AI, not black-box tools that can't survive audit or legislative scrutiny.

data.label: Data
data.title: Detect Risk With Agency-Owned Intelligence
data.description: Our models cross-reference your operational, fiscal, and third-party data to flag revenue leakage and spending anomalies other platforms miss.

compliance.label: Compliance
compliance.title: Explainable Decisions Your Auditors Can Trust
compliance.description: Every score is defensible. Rules-based and AI-driven analysis stay transparent, compliant, and adaptable to your agency's legal framework.

speed.label: Speed
speed.title: From Data to Impact in Weeks, Not Years
speed.description: Purpose-built deployments move from data audit to operational models quickly, with hands-on support through transfer to your teams.

sovereignty.label: Sovereignty
sovereignty.title: Sovereign AI That Stays Under Your Control
sovereignty.description: Models are built for government context, deployed in your environment, and owned by your institution, not locked in a vendor cloud.

solutionsDetail.title: Every Solution. Every Use Case.
solutionsDetail.subtitle: Seven custom-built models covering revenue maximization and expenditure rationalization, each with measurable value delivered.

caseStudies.title: Built for Government's Unique Challenges
caseStudies.quote: Our models give enforcement teams actionable intelligence they can defend, recovering revenue while strengthening public trust.

revenue.heading: Recover What Is Owed. Protect the Public Purse.
revenue.intro: Governments lose significant revenues each year to fraud, underreporting, and evasion. Our revenue maximization solutions use advanced AI models to detect anomalies, identify fraudulent behavior, and support enforcement teams with actionable intelligence.

expenditure.heading: Spend Better. Waste Less. Serve More.
expenditure.intro: Public spending is under constant scrutiny. Beyond cutting budgets, governments need smarter ways to ensure every dollar spent achieves its intended purpose. Our expenditure rationalization solutions bring AI intelligence to procurement, benefits, and operational spending.

revenue.heading: Recover What Is Owed. Protect the Public Purse.
revenue.intro: All models are built to be explainable, compliant, and adaptable to your agency's legal framework.

salesRevenue.title: Sales Revenue Fraud Detection
salesRevenue.description: Businesses may underreport their actual sales revenue to reduce their tax obligations. Our model analyzes declared turnover figures against consumption patterns, sector benchmarks, supplier transactions, and employment data to flag inconsistencies and high-risk cases for audit prioritization.

incomeTax.title: Income-Based Tax Fraud Detection
incomeTax.description: Our income tax fraud detection model cross-references declared income across multiple data sources employment records, financial transactions, lifestyle indicators, and third-party reporting to identify individuals and entities whose declared income appears inconsistent with observed economic activity.

profitBased.title: Profit-Based Fraud Detection
profitBased.description: Profit manipulation through artificial cost inflation, transfer pricing abuse, or intercompany transactions is one of the most sophisticated forms of tax evasion. Our model examines financial statements, related-party transactions, and industry profit margins to surface entities likely engaging in profit-shifting schemes.
benefits: Support for large taxpayer monitoring units

customs.title: Customs Fraud Detection
customs.description: Customs fraud including undervaluation of imported goods, misclassification of product categories, and smuggling represents a major source of revenue leakage for governments. Our models analyze import/export declarations, shipping data, pricing references, and historical patterns to identify suspicious transactions.

expenditure.heading: Spend Better. Waste Less. Serve More.
expenditure.intro: Our expenditure rationalization solutions identify fraud, losses, and quality gaps before they compound, bringing AI intelligence to procurement, benefits, and operational spending.

expenditureFraud.title: Expenditure Fraud Detection
expenditureFraud.description: From procurement fraud and false invoicing to benefits abuse and payroll manipulation, fraudulent expenditure drains public resources. Our models analyze transaction patterns, vendor relationships, approval workflows, and claim histories to surface anomalies indicative of fraudulent activity.
benefits: Early detection of procurement and payment fraud
Reduced exposure to benefits and subsidy abuse

lossDetection.title: Loss Detection in Public Spending
lossDetection.description: Not all spending losses are fraudulent, many result from inefficiency, duplication, process failures, or poor contract management. Our loss detection models identify where public funds are being spent without delivering proportional value, enabling agencies to redirect resources more effectively.
benefits: Identification of non-fraudulent but wasteful spending

spendingQuality.title: Spending Quality Improvement
spendingQuality.description: Beyond detecting what is wrong, we help government clients understand what good looks like. Our spending quality models benchmark expenditure patterns against performance outcomes, flagging areas where spending could be restructured to deliver better public value.
benefits: Better alignment of spending with policy outcomes

businessCases.title: Proven Impact for Public Institutions
businessCases.description: Our government clients rely on custom-built models that deliver measurable financial outcomes.

case1.title: Tax Authority Revenue Recovery
case1.description: A provincial revenue agency deployed our sales revenue fraud detection model to prioritize audit cases and recover undeclared revenues.
case1.metric: Increased audit efficiency and revenue recovery

case2.title: Customs Inspection Optimization
case2.description: A national customs administration integrated our fraud detection models to prioritize high-risk import declarations, improving border inspection outcomes while reducing revenue leakage.

case3.title: Public Spending Accountability
case3.description: A government department used our spending quality models to benchmark program expenditures against outcomes, enabling data-driven budget restructuring and stronger accountability reporting.
case3.metric: Better alignment of spending with policy outcomes

cta.title: The AI Command Center for Smarter Public Finance
cta.subtitle: Book time with our experts to discuss revenue recovery, expenditure rationalization, and sovereign deployment for your agency.

solutions.lossDetection: Solution — loss detection in public spending

caseStudies.case1: Case study — tax authority revenue recovery

meta.title: Your Financial Future Deserves Better Intelligence | iKwook
meta.description: AI-driven financial analysis for individuals — clarity, insight, and tools to make smarter decisions with your money.

hero.title: Your Financial Future Deserves Better Intelligence
hero.subtitle: We bring the power of AI-driven financial analysis to individuals — giving you the clarity, insight, and tools to make smarter decisions with your money.

services.title: Smarter Analysis. Clearer Decisions.
services.subtitle: Three services designed to turn your financial data into actionable intelligence — not generic advice.

performance.title: Personal Financial Performance Analysis
performance.heading: Understand Where Your Money Really Goes
performance.description: Most people manage their finances reactively — reviewing statements after the fact, making decisions based on incomplete pictures. Our personal financial analysis service builds a comprehensive model of your income, spending patterns, and financial behavior to give you a clear, structured view of your financial health — and where it can improve.

opportunities.title: Financial Opportunity Identification
opportunities.heading: Find the Value You're Leaving on the Table
opportunities.description: Hidden in your financial data are opportunities: unnecessary fees you are paying, tax positions you are not optimizing, savings you are not capturing, and investment behaviors that could be improved. We identify these opportunities with precision, giving you actionable recommendations grounded in your own data.

modeling.title: Personalized Financial Improvement Modeling
modeling.heading: A Plan Built Around Your Numbers, Not a Template
modeling.description: We do not offer generic financial advice. We build a model specific to your situation — your income, your goals, your risk profile, your obligations — and use it to map a realistic path toward your financial performance objectives, whether that means building savings, reducing debt, or growing wealth over time.

commitment.title: Enterprise-Grade Intelligence, Personal Privacy
commitment.text: The same quality of financial intelligence available to governments and major corporations is now accessible to you. We treat your financial data with the highest standards of confidentiality, and every model we build is yours — explained clearly, transferred fully, and designed to grow with you.

approach.title: How Does It Work?
approach.subtitle: Our approach — from your data to a model you own and can evolve.

dataPrep.title: Data Analysis and Preparation
dataPrep.description: We identify available data sources and assess their quality, relevance, and potential. If necessary, we propose the implementation of new data sources, the creation of data warehouses, and the development of tools for data extraction, transformation, and integration.

modelDesign.title: Model Design and Indicator Definition
modelDesign.description: We determine the solutions and models best suited to your objectives. In collaboration with you, we define the key performance indicators (KPIs), business rules, and analysis criteria specific to your situation in order to build customized models.

deployment.title: Deployment and Knowledge Transfer
deployment.description: We implement the solution, integrate it into your operational environment, and support you during its production launch. We also ensure knowledge transfer so that you can operate, maintain, and evolve the solution according to your needs and the evolution of your data.

cta.title: Your Financial Future Deserves Better Intelligence
cta.subtitle: Book time with our experts to discuss personal financial analysis, opportunity identification, and a model built around your numbers.

images.hero: Hero — personal finance command center, 16:9 recommended
images.commitment: Commitment — confidentiality and ownership visual, 21:9 recommended

approach.modelDesign: Approach — model design and KPI definition

meta.title: Financial Performance Intelligence for Enterprises | iKwook
meta.description: We help businesses uncover hidden losses, recover untapped revenue, and build models that make financial performance a competitive advantage.

hero.title: Financial Performance Intelligence For Forward-Thinking Companies
hero.subtitle: We Help Businesses Uncover Hidden Losses, Recover Untapped Revenue, And Build The Models That Make Financial Performance A Competitive Advantage.

resourceLoss.heading: Stop Losing What You Already Have
resourceLoss.description1: Many businesses operate with significant hidden losses - materials wasted in production, assets sitting idle, workforce hours misallocated, or services rendered without billing. These losses rarely appear clearly in financial statements, but they accumulate into major bottom-line impact over time.
resourceLoss.description2: Our resource loss detection models analyze your operational and financial data to identify where value is leaking - whether through physical waste, process inefficiency, underutilized capacity, or billing gaps. The result is a clear, prioritized picture of where recoverable value exists and how to act on it.

useCases.u3: Unbilled services and revenue leakage identification

clientIntelligence.heading: Grow Revenue by Understanding Your Clients Better
clientIntelligence.description1: Revenue growth is not always about acquiring new customers. For most businesses, the greatest opportunity lies in better serving and retaining the clients they already have - and converting occasional buyers into loyal, recurring relationships.
clientIntelligence.description2: Our client intelligence models analyze transaction histories, engagement patterns, behavioral signals, and lifecycle data to identify your highest-potential clients, predict churn risk, and surface opportunities to deepen relationships through the right offer at the right time.

useCases.u1: Recurring client identification and value modeling
useCases.u3: Churn prediction and early retention intervention

valueDelivered.v2: Reduced churn and improved retention rates
valueDelivered.v3: More targeted and effective growth strategies

wcu.text: Our enterprise clients are not looking for dashboards. They are looking for answers. We build models that produce specific, actionable intelligence tied directly to financial outcomes - and we stay engaged until those outcomes are real.

cases.title: Proven Impact For Enterprise Teams
cases.subtitle: Real scenarios where actionable intelligence translated into measurable financial outcomes - not just dashboards.

featured.title: Hidden Production Losses Recovered
featured.challenge: A mid-size manufacturer was losing value through material waste, idle assets, and misallocated labor - losses that never surfaced clearly in monthly financial reports.
featured.solution: We deployed resource loss detection models across production, asset utilization, and workforce allocation data to quantify leakage and prioritize recovery actions.

case1.title: Client Retention Uplift Through Intelligence
case1.description: A multi-location service business used client intelligence models to identify high-risk churn segments and deploy targeted retention offers at the right lifecycle moment.
case1.outcome: Higher client lifetime value across recurring segments

case2.title: Unbilled Revenue Identified and Recovered
case2.description: An enterprise services firm uncovered delivered work that was never invoiced by connecting operational activity logs with billing and contract data.
case2.outcome: Recovered billable services previously missed in operations

meta.title: Contact iKwook | Financial Performance Intelligence
meta.description: Get in touch with iKwook to discuss your financial performance goals — whether you represent a government agency, lead a business, or are an individual.

hero.title: Let's Talk About Your Financial Performance Goals
hero.subtitle: Whether you represent a government agency, lead a business, or are an individual ready to take control of your finances - we would like to hear from you.

form.title: Do you have any question?
form.subtitle: Tell us about your organization, your priorities, and the financial performance outcomes you want to achieve. Our team will respond with the right next steps.

fields.name: Name
fields.subject: Subject / Brief Description of Your Needs

hero.title: Unlock Financial Performance
hero.subtitle: Custom AI models that help governments, enterprises, and individuals maximize revenue, reduce losses, detect fraud, and optimize intelligence.

scale.title: Designed for Every Scale
scale.subtitle: Our intelligence models are specifically tuned for the unique challenges of public sectors, global enterprises, and private wealth.

governments.title: Governments
governments.description: Sovereign-grade intelligence for revenue maximization and fraud detection.

enterprises.title: Enterprises
enterprises.description: Empower your CFO with deep-learning models that predict churn and identify anomalies.

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.description: Premium wealth optimization tools previously reserved for institutional clients.

intelligence.title: Intelligence That Adapts in Real-Time

points.title: Precision Discovery
points.description: Our models ingest trillions of data points to find the signals that others miss.

points.title: Neural Architecture
points.description: Sophisticated deep learning structures that mirror complex financial ecosystems.

points.title: Actionable Outcomes
points.description: We don't just provide data; we provide clear, measurable financial uplift.

intelligence.discover_desc: We map your financial ecosystem and identify key areas of friction and revenue leakage.
intelligence.model_desc: Our engineers build custom neural networks trained specifically on your domain data.
intelligence.deploy_desc: Seamless integration into existing ERP with real-time KPI tracking and optimization.

team.title: Led by Financial Visionaries
team.description: Our team consists of Ph.D. researchers, former central bankers, and world-class software engineers dedicated to the science of wealth maximization.
